title: [Bug]: LLMConfig cannot be imported from cognee.api.v1.config
author: Y-Hans
body: LLMConfig cannot be imported from `cognee.api.v1.config`, causing ImportError for code attempting configuration setup. Root cause analysis says `cognee/api/v1/config/__init__.py` likely does not export LLMConfig. Reproduction: `from cognee.api.v1.config import LLMConfig` raises ImportError.
comments: Proof of bug: ImportError raised immediately when importing LLMConfig from cognee.api.v1.config.

title: bug: Inconsistent retry limit check and incorrect docstring in deadlock_retry decorator
author: anuragj757
body: The deadlock_retry decorator used for Neo4j driver retry attempts treats Neo4jError and DatabaseUnavailable differently. DatabaseUnavailable is retried one time less than Neo4jError. Specifically, in cognee/infrastructure/databases/graph/neo4j_driver/deadlock_retry.py, Neo4jError uses `attempt > max_retries` while DatabaseUnavailable uses `attempt >= max_retries`.
comments: Proposed fix: align DatabaseUnavailable retry check with Neo4jError and update the deadlock_retry docstring.

title: Bug: Inconsistent API error responses in improve , forget , and recall routers
author: AdeshDeshmukh
body: The improve, forget, and recall routers return raw dicts like {"error":"..."} instead of ErrorResponse.model_dump(), use non-standard HTTP status codes, and lack responses decorators so Swagger docs do not show error schemas.
comments: Root cause: improve, forget, and recall routers missed the standardized API error response update.

title: [Bug]: Data deletion returns 500 while dataset pipeline is processing
author: Timidan
body: Deleting a single data item fails with 500 Internal Server Error while the dataset cognify pipeline is running. The affected surfaces include POST /api/v1/forget with dataId and DELETE /api/v1/datasets/{dataset_id}/data/{data_id}.

title: [Hackathon] Vellum integration - cognee memory nodes for Vellum Workflows
author: dexters1
body: Build cognee-integration-vellum: a Python package of custom Vellum Workflows SDK nodes and Agent Node tools that give workflows persistent memory backed by cognee.

title: Hackathon | [Docs]: Add a Neo4j AuraDB setup guide for first-time users
author: Adii0906
body: The documentation explains the required Neo4j environment variables but does not include a setup guide for first-time users. Add steps for creating a free Neo4j AuraDB instance and configuring .env variables.

title: [integrations] Add COGNEE_REMEMBER_TIMEOUT / COGNEE_REGISTER_TIMEOUT env vars
author: Vasilije1990
body: Only COGNEE_RECALL_TIMEOUT exists today. Add named per-operation timeouts COGNEE_REMEMBER_TIMEOUT and COGNEE_REGISTER_TIMEOUT so remember and register can be tuned independently of recall.

title: [integrations] Retry first recall on cold-start timeout
author: Vasilije1990
body: On a recall timeout or connection error during the first recall of a session, retry once or twice with a short backoff before falling back to no-context.

title: Hackathon: Support-triage bot powered by cognee memory
author: Vasilije1990
body: A bot watches a support channel, recalls similar past issues and resolutions from memory, and suggests an answer with citations to prior threads.

title: Hackathon: Shared chat-memory adapter core for bots
author: Vasilije1990
body: Build a small framework-agnostic layer that every cognee-powered bot plugs into so bots share one consistent memory model with ingest, answer, and forget primitives.

title: Hackathon: Make memory agents can trust - rankable, citable results + actionable errors
author: Vasilije1990
body: Agents need memory that returns results they can rank and cite, plus errors they can act on programmatically. Build normalized relevance, structured citations, and actionable error contracts.

title: Hackathon: build LLM-mocked tests for all examples in the repo
author: Vasilije1990
body: Add LLM-mocked tests for every example script so examples run in CI without real API keys and fail loudly when imports, signatures, or runtime behavior break.

title: Temporal awareness in the Cognee brain
author: Vasilije1990
body: Add a temporality layer so stored knowledge carries temporal context and can be reasoned about over time, including staleness and freshness prediction.

title: Codex test-suite parity
author: NMZivkovic
body: Codex has zero tests while claude-code has a full suite. Port equivalent tests for client, recall, remember, session-id, poll, and badge behavior.

title: Docs: install/update polish + one-command install smoke script
author: NMZivkovic
body: Tighten README install and update steps and add a script that verifies plugin marketplace add and plugin install end-to-end on a clean checkout.
